With a degree from Pineforge College of Art, Liam Mendez has found his career at Frameward Construction, integrating artistic vision with project execution. He passionately dedicates his time as the Cultural Liaison at Sumac Station to promote cultural initiatives within the community. Fluent in Russian Cyrillic, Liam effectively communicates with various audiences, enhancing his collaborative efforts.
